info.name: Mess Management SaaS - Full API
info.description: Complete API documentation for the Mess Management SaaS system, categorized by modules.

item.name: Auth Module
item.description: User authentication, registration, OTP verification, and profile management.

request.description: Role: Public - Create a new user account. Required fields: fullname, email, phone, password. Optional: role (default: member).
Role: Public - Verify user email using 6-digit OTP. Required fields: email, otp.
Role: Public - Authenticate user and receive Access Token. Required fields: email, password.
Role: All Roles - Get current logged-in user's profile data. Requires Bearer Token.

formdata.description: JSON string containing updated profile data (fullname, phone, address).

request.description: Role: All Roles - Update profile. Uses multipart/form-data. Fields: profileImage (file), data (JSON string with fullname, phone, address).
Role: Public - Initiate password reset. Sends OTP to the provided email. Required: email.
Role: Public - Reset password using OTP received via email. Required: email, otp, newPassword.
Role: Public - Verify OTP specifically for password reset process. Required: email, otp.
Role: All Roles - Change account password for logged-in user. Required: oldPassword, newPassword.

item.name: Mess Module
item.description: Mess creation, membership, settings, and member management.

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Dream Home Mess",
    "address": "Sector 10, Uttara, Dhaka",
    "phone": "01712345678",
    "description": "A friendly mess for students and professionals.",
    "mealOffTime": "08:00"
}

request.description: Role: Manager - Creates a new mess. The creator becomes the manager. Required: name, address, phone. Optional: description, mealOffTime.
Role: Member - Join a mess using a unique 6-character invite code. Required: inviteCode.

variable.description: The unique ID of the mess.

request.description: Role: All Roles - Get specific mess details by ID.

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Updated Mess Name",
    "address": "New Address, Dhaka",
    "phone": "018XXXXXXXX",
    "description": "Updated description for the mess",
    "mealOffTime": "09:00"
}

variable.description: The unique ID of the mess.

request.description: Role: Manager - Update mess configuration. Fields: name, address, phone, description, mealOffTime.

variable.description: The unique ID of the mess.

request.description: Role: Super Admin - Suspend or activate a mess. Required: status (active/suspended).

query.description: Search by name, address, or phone.

request.description: Role: Super Admin - Fetch all messes in the system with pagination, search, and sort. Filters: page, limit, sort, fields, searchTerm, name, address, phone.

variable.description: The unique ID of the mess to delete.

request.description: Role: Manager/Super Admin - Permanently deletes the mess and unlinks all members.

variable.description: The unique ID of the mess.

request.description: Role: Manager - Transfers manager role to another member. Required: newManagerId. Optional: leaveAfterTransfer (boolean).

query.description: Filter by module (deposit, expense, meal, member, etc.).

request.description: Role: Manager - View all mess activities/transaction logs. This is the 'History' of the mess.

item.name: User Module
item.description: Super Admin operations for managing users and roles.

query.description: Search by fullname, email, or phone.

request.description: Role: Super Admin - Get all users with pagination and search. Filters: page, limit, sort, fields, searchTerm, fullname, email, phone, role.

variable.description: The unique ID of the user.

request.description: Role: Super Admin - Update user role. Required: role (member/manager/super_admin).
Role: Manager - Record daily meal counts for members. Required: date (YYYY-MM-DD), entries (array of memberId, breakfast, lunch, dinner, guest counts).
Role: Manager/Member - Get meal history with pagination and filters. Filters: page, limit, sort, fields, date.

query.description: Any date within the target month (YYYY-MM-DD).

request.description: Role: Manager/Member - Get total meals per member for a specific month. Required: date (any day in the month).

variable.description: Target date (YYYY-MM-DD).

request.description: Role: Manager/Member - Get meal counts for a specific date.

variable.description: The unique ID of the meal entry.

request.description: Role: Manager/Member - Get specific meal entry details by ID.

variable.description: The unique ID of the meal entry.

request.description: Role: Manager - Delete a specific meal entry.

Role: Manager/Member - Record a new deposit. Required: memberId (ObjectId), amount (number), paymentMethod (cash/mobile_banking/bank_transfer). Optional: date (YYYY-MM-DD), transactionId (string), note (string). Member entries are pending until manager approval.

query.description: Search by transactionId, note, or member name.

request.description: Role: Manager/Member - Get all deposits with pagination, search, and filtering. Filters: page, limit, sort, fields, status (pending/approved/rejected), paymentMethod, memberId, transactionId, note, date.

variable.description: The unique ID of the deposit record.

request.description: Role: Manager/Member - Get specific deposit details by ID.

variable.description: The unique ID of the deposit record.

request.description: Role: Manager - Approve or Reject a deposit request. Required: status (approved/rejected).

variable.description: The unique ID of the deposit record.

request.description: Role: Manager - Permanently delete a deposit record.

item.name: Expense Module
item.description: Daily expense and bazaar management for messes.

request.description: Role: Manager/Member - Create a new expense entry. Required: details (array of category, itemName, amount), paymentSource (mess_fund/manager_hand/member_hand). Optional: date (YYYY-MM-DD), buyerId (required if category is not loss/mess_income), adjustment (number). Member entries are pending until manager approval.
Role: Manager - Record a financial loss. Category MUST be 'loss'. buyerId is not required.
Role: Manager - Record general income for the mess. Category MUST be 'mess_income'. This reduces net expenses for meal rate calculation. buyerId is not required.

query.description: Search by itemName, category, or buyer name.

request.description: Role: Manager/Member - Get all expenses with pagination, search, and filtering. Filters: page, limit, sort, fields, paymentSource, status (pending/approved/rejected), buyerId, details.category, details.itemName, date.

variable.description: The unique ID of the expense record.

request.description: Role: Manager/Member - Get specific expense details by ID.

variable.description: The unique ID of the expense record.

request.description: Role: Manager - Approve or reject an expense request. Required: status (approved/rejected).

variable.description: The unique ID of the expense record.

request.description: Role: Manager - Permanently delete an expense record.
Role: Manager - Add a member to the mess manually. Required: fullname, email, phone. Optional: password (default: 123456). If the user doesn't exist, a new account is created.

query.description: Search by fullname, email, or phone.
Field to sort by (e.g., -createdAt for descending).

request.description: Role: Manager/Member - Get all members of the mess with pagination, search, and filtering. Filters: page, limit, sort, fields, status, searchTerm, fullname, email, phone.

variable.description: The unique ID of the member record.

request.description: Role: Manager/Member - Get specific member details by ID.

variable.description: The unique ID of the member record.

request.description: Role: Manager - Update a member's status. Required: status (active/inactive).

variable.description: The unique ID of the User to be removed from the mess.

request.description: Role: Manager - Remove a member from the mess. This unlinks their messId.

item.name: Notice Module
item.description: Notice board and announcements for the mess.

request.description: Role: Manager - Create a new notice for the mess members. Required: title, description. Optional: status (active/inactive).
Role: Member/Manager - Get all notices for the mess. Filters: page, limit, sort, fields, searchTerm, status (active/inactive).

variable.description: The unique ID of the notice.

request.description: Role: Member/Manager - Get details of a specific notice by ID.

variable.description: The unique ID of the notice.

request.description: Role: Manager - Update notice title, description, or status.

variable.description: The unique ID of the notice.

request.description: Role: Manager - Permanently delete a notice.
Role: Member/Manager - Submit a request to stop meals for a date range. Required: startDate (YYYY-MM-DD), endDate (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional: reason.

query.description: Search by status or member name.

request.description: Role: Manager - Get all meal off requests in the mess. Filters: page, limit, sort, searchTerm, status (pending/approved/rejected), fields.

query.description: Search by status or date range.

request.description: Role: Member/Manager - Get current user's meal off requests. Filters: page, limit, sort, searchTerm, status, fields.

item.name: Get Meal Off Request By ID (Member/Manager)

variable.description: The unique ID of the request.

request.description: Role: Member/Manager - Get specific meal off request details by ID.

variable.description: The unique ID of the request.

request.description: Role: Manager - Approve or reject a meal off request. Required: status (approved/rejected).

item.name: Report Module
item.description: Summary reports and analytics for the mess.

request.description: Role: Member/Manager - Get real-time dashboard stats for the current user and the mess. Includes all-time balance, today's meal status, recent transactions, and upcoming bills. Calculations are month-aware and guest-meal adjusted.

query.description: Filter summary by specific month (YYYY-MM). If omitted, returns all-time summary.

request.description: Role: Member/Manager - Get comprehensive mess report (Total Deposits, Expenses, Meal Rate, Member Wise Summary). Month-by-month logic ensures no retroactive changes to older records. Guest meals are charged to the host.

item.name: Utility Bill Module
item.description: Utility bills management (electricity, water, gas, internet, etc.).

request.description: Role: Manager - Create a new utility bill. Required: category (electricity/water/gas/internet/others), amount (number), month (YYYY-MM), dueDate (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional: note.
Role: Manager/Member - Get utility bills with pagination and filters. Filters: page, limit, sort, fields, month, status (unpaid/paid), category, note.

variable.description: The unique ID of the utility bill.

request.description: Role: Manager/Member - Get specific utility bill details by ID.

variable.description: The unique ID of the utility bill.

request.description: Role: Manager - Update existing utility bill fields.

variable.description: The unique ID of the utility bill.

request.description: Role: Manager - Mark a bill as paid. Required: memberId (who paid), paymentDate (YYYY-MM-DD).

variable.description: The unique ID of the utility bill.

request.description: Role: Manager - Permanently delete a utility bill.
